name: Miso Soup with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Bean curd, fresh; cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the stock according to the package instructions. Bring to a simmer.
2. Stir in the miso using a wire whisk.
3. Add sugar, kamaboko, and bean curd.
4. Divide the soup into five bowls.
5. Add scallions and shrimp to each bowl.
